title: Digital Technology
author: Priya
content:
All emerging technologies today have greatly influenced us to make our lives a lot simpler and more diverse. The age of digital technology brought a lot of adaptation in our living standards, from smart devices to AI and engineering. From stone age to the era of modernization, with all sorts of equipment and large machinery, is a renaissance in technology and a big experience for us to learn from this technological journey. Now we have all things of our comfort in our usable limits that have expedited our lives and made them more fast-paced. These smart devices around us have made us digitally native to their use and more of a geeky technophile who has made technology their only plausible source of enriching joy and fulfillment. And for us living without them is living without our only existence because these smart devices made us realise who we r and how to connect with the world.

Digital world and the Revolutionary change -
Technology is evolving at a faster pace and bringing innumerable changes in our lives and surroundings. The advancement of science, mechanics, and AI has transformed us from a common man to an extraordinary living being. We never imagined that while sitting at a place away from home, we could operate our smart electrical appliances or remotely handle our smart devices through a virtual setup, or even look into the sky deep within through satellites to examine rotation and revolution of every celestial body in space. And the ascription of these evolving, emerging digital tech goes to our great scientists, researchers, and technocrats.
But r we going too far with these tech advancements and automation that we r endangering ourselves by risking our health and body with excessive use of these digital gadgets for some work simplicity, quicker response, and bodily comfort.

Smart devices and their side effects -
We say too much of anything is bad. Taking an overdose of food can screwed up your physical health, excess of running or walking could cause body cramps. In the same way, too much dependence on these digital tech and smart devices can make u mentally inactive and physically indisposed. We're getting used to them for even a meaner job, which is destroying our cognitive ability, our mental power, and eating us up internally. Their addiction is giving us mental stroke, acting as a trauma for our brain health, putting us in a vegetative state when your brain can't act your way. adding up to causing u brain fog, experiencing a mental health slump resulting in weakening memory.

Our daily screen time takes up most of our due time in trivialising ourselves by watching reels and shorts on our phones. And sticking to our smartphones day in day out has become a customary habit that can't be given away so easily. High screen time with low or no physical activities adds to high risk factors for body ailments, mental collapse, ageing, and other skin problems.


Our digital assets and Personality factor -
No doubt advance technologies and digital devices greatly help in easing our lives by doing our work 10 times faster than doing it manually on our own. And also our personality building and digital tech have a close tie-in with 1 another and so with health. Occupying oneself with smart devices helps in spiralling up our personality graph in varied ways -

* They lift up our financial status and make others think of us as some rich, wealthy brats of the socially high upper class.
* We sound more well-educated, highly professional, and digitally literate by keeping these smart digital assets in our social presence.
* We can flaunt them to others and create a good impression of ourselves. And also, we can influence others to have a good, ultra-rich lifestyle like ours.
* We can keep ourselves updated with the current market trend by keeping ourselves paced up with the latest technology.
* Just along with putting ourselves upgraded with the latest tech, we can also induce other's into matching up with our modern, loaded, balanced sheet of money.


Now, since these tech devices pose various health concerns for our body, we should keep them with us for a public vision, but shouldn't be using them at all times. They enhance our personality in 1 way and r a getaway to a well-heeled, highborn lifestyle, and on the run, putting ourselves in a tight corner with our body and mind in distress.

So, good to brandish them like an all show but no go as a grandstand of your showy personality but by ghosting yourself to its excessive use because u can cake up your personality by being more flashy with your digital assets, but in the same hand, your health and curvaceous figure is the real flex to your donning personality for a rizz with no frizz.
